ext_name.description: Extension name shown in the browser toolbar and store listing. Brand name — keep identical in all locales.

ext_description.message: Select text on any page to get an instant AI translation and a learner-friendly explanation.
ext_description.description: Extension description shown in the store listing and chrome://extensions.

popup_status_ready.description: Temporary status line in the toolbar popup during early development (M1).

modal_trigger_label.description: Accessible label + tooltip of the floating trigger icon that appears next to a text selection.

modal_close_label.description: Accessible label for the × button that closes the translation modal.

modal_loading_text.description: Placeholder shown in the modal while a translation request is in flight.

modal_error_generic.message: Something went wrong. Please try again.
modal_error_generic.description: Fallback error text in the translation modal when no specific error message is available.

options_engine_section_heading.description: Section heading for the engine picker on the options page.

options_engine_auto_label.description: Option that lets the extension pick an engine automatically instead of a fixed choice.

options_engine_auto_hint.message: Uses the free trial engine by default, and the on-device engine when needed.
options_engine_auto_hint.description: Explains what Automatic engine selection does.

options_status_available.description: Status label shown next to an engine that can be used right now.

options_status_unavailable.description: Status label shown next to an engine that cannot be used right now.

options_keys_section_heading.description: Section heading for BYOK provider key fields.

options_gemini_key_label.description: Label for the Gemini API key input field.

options_key_input_placeholder.description: Placeholder text inside an API key input field.

options_save_button.description: Button that saves an API key field.

options_saved_confirmation.description: Brief confirmation shown after saving an API key.

options_target_lang_heading.description: Section heading for the target-language picker.

options_ui_lang_heading.description: Section heading explaining the extension UI language.

options_ui_lang_note.message: This extension's own interface follows your browser's language. To change it, adjust the language order in Chrome's settings.
options_ui_lang_note.description: Note explaining that UI language is not independently switchable in the MVP.

options_engine_label_trial_gateway.description: Display name for the trial-gateway engine in the picker.

options_engine_label_on_device.description: Display name for the on-device engine in the picker.

options_engine_label_gemini.description: Display name for the Gemini BYOK engine in the picker.
